SlabWebPy
HomeDocs

Code Block Component

Display source code with syntax labeling, copy button, and line numbers

View Docs

Python Example — Light Theme

With copy button and line numbers

fibonacci.py
1def fibonacci(n: int) -> int:


2    """Calculate the nth Fibonacci number."""


3    if n <= 1:


4        return n


5    return fibonacci(n - 1) + fibonacci(n - 2)


6 


7# Usage


8result = fibonacci(10)


9print(f"Fibonacci(10) = {result}")

JavaScript Example — Dark Theme

With line numbers and copy button

sum.js
1const calculateSum = (arr) => {


2    return arr.reduce((acc, num) => acc + num, 0);


3};


4 


5const numbers = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5];


6const sum = calculateSum(numbers);


7console.log(`Sum: ${sum}`);  // Output: Sum: 15

HTML Example

Without line numbers

index.html
<div class="container mx-auto p-6">
    <h1 class="text-3xl font-bold mb-4">Welcome!</h1>
    <p class="text-gray-600">This is a sample HTML snippet.</p>
</div>

SQL Example

Dark theme without title

1SELECT users.id, users.name, COUNT(orders.id) as order_count


2FROM users


3LEFT JOIN orders ON users.id = orders.user_id


4GROUP BY users.id, users.name


5ORDER BY order_count DESC


6LIMIT 10;

Bash Example

Simple script

deploy.sh
1#!/bin/bash


2# Deploy script


3echo "Building..."


4npm run build


5echo "Deploying to production..."


6git add .


7git commit -m "Deploy: $(date)"


8git push origin main

JSON Example

Configuration file

package.json
{
  "name": "slabwebpy",
  "version": "0.3.0",
  "description": "Build modern web apps with Python",
  "author": "DEV-Gordon",
  "license": "MIT",
  "repository": "https://github.com/DEV-Gordon/slabwebpy"
}
